title: Ops runbook + maintenance rotation + cycle cadence + governed process for community domains & cap/gate changes
context: A sustainable deed needs a documented operating discipline: how to run a cycle, respond to incidents, re-verify sources, and - critically - the governed process for any budget-cap/gate/refusal change (human + governance only, never engine self-modified). This M5 task writes the ops runbook, names a maintenance rotation, and documents the (non-continuous) cycle cadence and the governance process for community-proposed domains.
objective: Write the ops runbook and governance documentation: deploy, running a cycle, incident response, source re-verification, fail-closed budget behavior, a named maintenance rotation, a documented non-continuous cycle cadence, and the governed process for community-proposed domains and any budget-cap/gate/refusal change.
acceptanceCriteria: Runbook covers deploy, running a cycle, incident response, source re-verification, and the fail-closed budget behavior; names a maintenance rotation; documents a cycle cadence (not continuous)
Documents the governed process for community-proposed domains and for any budget-cap/gate/refusal change (human + governance only; never engine self-modified)
Reviewed and signed off by the maintainer + steward (recorded)
